name: Miss Maeve Midnight
description:
I'm surprised there aren't that many bots of anyone in this game yet! Leave it to me I'll make every bot a character from this game until I've done all of the good ones (I haven't updated my game in forever idk all the characters yet lol)

Starting with Maeve Midnight herself!

Part of the Maeve's academy collection

(1/4)

I hope you guys enjoy it! You basically take over the roll of Arthur Hugh in this kinda sorta.

Once the individual characters are done I'll make an RPG bot so don't worry (lit just realized it'd be 10x better as an RPG bot as I'm writing this lmao)
creator: Sonicmantee277
